dialectic.thesis: Build one portal where sales, plant, quality, maintenance, procurement, and leadership work from shared evidence.
dialectic.antithesis: Email threads, Drive folders, chat groups, ERP exports, and manual sheets fragment the operating record.
dialectic.synthesis: A tenant-specific agent workspace turns human-organized data into role-safe workflows, industrial analysis, and governed AI assistance.

workspaces.name: Executive Command
workspaces.mission: Show company risk, supply pressure, quality exposure, and commercial movement in one daily brief.

workspaces.name: Commercial Desk
workspaces.mission: Run dealer follow-up, quote memory, visit planning, and market demand signals.

workspaces.name: Plant Command
workspaces.mission: Control inbound blockers, shift issues, approvals, and daily execution from one queue.

workspaces.name: DQMS and Quality Lab
workspaces.mission: Handle incidents, CAPA, containment, fishbone, 5W1H, and structured quality closeout.

workspaces.name: Maintenance and Reliability
workspaces.mission: Track breakdowns, preventive plans, spare-part blockers, and repeat-failure studies.

workspaces.name: Tenant Admin and Connector Control
workspaces.mission: Manage users, modules, domains, connector scope, policy, and AI workforce posture.

role_profiles.name: CEO
role_profiles.mission: See cross-company risk, operating pressure, and decision-ready narratives.

role_profiles.name: Admin
role_profiles.mission: Own roles, connector posture, rollout governance, and meta-tool control.

role_profiles.name: Sales
role_profiles.mission: Move dealer relationships, quote follow-up, and market signals through one CRM layer.

role_profiles.name: Plant Manager
role_profiles.mission: Review production risk, plant blockers, and countermeasure ownership across the factory.

role_profiles.name: Quality Manager
role_profiles.mission: Close incidents with evidence, containment, cause, and corrective action discipline.

role_profiles.name: Maintenance Lead
role_profiles.mission: Reduce repeat failures and translate downtime into fixable reliability programs.

role_profiles.name: Receiving Clerk
role_profiles.mission: Capture inbound variance, holds, COA evidence, and supplier recovery triggers cleanly.

tool_profiles.name: Executive Command Stack
guardrails: Sensitive writebacks require admin or manager sign-off

tool_profiles.name: Tenant Control Stack
guardrails: Policy and rollout changes are reviewable

tool_profiles.name: Commercial Stack
guardrails: Agents may draft but not send external communications without review
Collections or pricing escalations need approval

tool_profiles.name: Plant Command Stack
guardrails: Line status changes must remain attributable
Hold or release decisions require evidence
Inbound corrections stay attached to source documents

tool_profiles.name: Quality Stack
guardrails: Root-cause suggestions remain draft until accepted

tool_profiles.name: Reliability Stack
guardrails: Downtime and failure coding must preserve source history

knowledge_resources.name: Gmail and attachment intake
knowledge_resources.source: dealer, supplier, quality, and finance email threads

knowledge_resources.name: Google Drive shared folders
knowledge_resources.source: plant folders, QC evidence, maintenance sheets, SOP vault, finance docs

knowledge_resources.name: ERP and CSV exports
knowledge_resources.source: PO, GRN, stock, invoice, batch, branch, and production extracts

knowledge_resources.name: Shopfloor logs and mobile forms
knowledge_resources.source: mixing, extrusion, calender, building, curing, inspection, downtime

knowledge_resources.name: Manager action board
knowledge_resources.source: task queue and role-based work management

knowledge_resources.name: Tenant operating context
knowledge_resources.source: Yangon Tyre context template and portal models

trust_boundaries.name: Raw to canonical boundary
trust_boundaries.rule: Email, chat, OCR, and folder contents remain raw until normalized and reviewed before promotion.

trust_boundaries.name: Commercial send gate
trust_boundaries.rule: Agents may draft sales or supplier responses but cannot send or confirm commitments without human approval.

trust_boundaries.name: Release and hold gate
trust_boundaries.rule: Material release, hold, CAPA closeout, and supplier override actions require evidence-backed authorization.

trust_boundaries.name: Tenant admin gate
trust_boundaries.rule: Connector scope, user roles, rollout posture, and domain changes stay limited to admin-capable roles.

trust_boundaries.name: Autonomous field-write gate
trust_boundaries.rule: Agents can suggest classifications, priorities, and summaries but sensitive record changes remain review-first.

ai_teams.name: Intake Router
ai_teams.mission: Classify mail, files, forms, and chat into the correct app, owner, and queue lane.

ai_teams.name: Quality Watch
ai_teams.mission: Detect emerging defect patterns, evidence gaps, and overdue CAPA closeout work.

ai_teams.name: Maintenance Reliability Cell
ai_teams.mission: Rank repeat failures, connect downtime with plant evidence, and prepare reliability actions.
ai_teams.approval_gate: Plant manager or maintenance lead review

ai_teams.name: Commercial Memory Pod
ai_teams.mission: Turn fragmented dealer and inquiry signals into a coherent account timeline and next move.

ai_teams.name: Executive Brief Cell
ai_teams.mission: Synthesize cross-functional risk, KPI gaps, and intervention candidates for leadership.

execution_loops.name: Incoming material and supplier assurance
execution_loops.trigger: New receipt, missing COA, quantity variance, or delayed supplier response

execution_loops.name: Quality closeout loop
execution_loops.trigger: Incident open, CAPA overdue, repeat defect cluster, or missing evidence

execution_loops.name: Maintenance and repeat-failure loop
execution_loops.trigger: Downtime event, spare-part blocker, or recurring machine fault

execution_loops.name: Dealer follow-up and demand loop
execution_loops.trigger: New inquiry, missed follow-up, visit plan, or market shift

execution_loops.name: Executive review and gap-analysis loop
execution_loops.trigger: Daily brief cycle, KPI miss, or cross-functional escalation
